== Notes for [[Item:Q111908|Q111908]] ==

Not known son of https://www.geni.com/people/Munio-Guterres-de-Celanova-III-Conde-del-Sobrado/6000000021801820504 & https://www.geni.com/people/Elvira-Arias/4069076529180010318

and ugly old mono admin single descendant '' "el feyxo" '' line abandoned:
https://www.geni.com/list/descendants/6000000003297959406#10

Source PLZ

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
